race.comment: Good race with plenty of chances. NOTTINGTON PRINCE (1) has been in great form for the new yard, winning two of three runs. Cairns winner in a similar race last time when stalking the speed and can measure up again. HOT COCOA (6) is a progressive filly winning her maiden fresh this course and distance then finishing fourth latest here over 1200m. Not far from the winner and back in trip is worth another chance. Stablemate DRAGON TALES (2) is a super consistent type resuming. Placed in a similar race to this before a spell and has placed fresh. Expected to go close. EXCELBOOM (3) is having his first run for a new yard after a let-up. Looks well weighted and best figures measure up. PENROD (10) resumes from a break and has placed only try course and distance. Still a maiden but expected to run well.
